3_runner.notes: 2026-04-17 single-walker extension in progress — Job 44008381 (extend of probe Job 43813633 via gmx convert-tpr -extend 40000 + plumed_restart.dat RESTART) at 25.56 ns, max s=2.794. 5-ns-window max s trend 1.182→1.393→1.455→1.807→2.794 (last window jumped ~1.0 — walker likely crossing a barrier, not plateaued). Decision gate at 50 ns per replication/validations/2026-04-17_single_walker_timeline.md: max s≥5 → Phase 2 (10-walker); max s<3 → Phase 3 (4HPX-seeded dual-walker). Prior eras: Job 42679152 (PATHMSD, SIGMA=0.05 ADAPTIVE=GEOM) completed 2026-04-12 but stuck at s(R)=1.0-1.6 (FP-024 SIGMA collapse, 25000 hills piled at s≈1). Fix 2026-04-15: SIGMA 0.05→0.1, SIGMA_MIN=0.3,0.005 SIGMA_MAX=1.0,0.05. Probe Job 43813633 (10 ns) reached max s=1.393 with activated-barrier escape signal in final 2 ns; extended to 50 ns as Job 44008381. Archives: archive_FP022_broken_2026-04-09/ (Job 41514529 FUNCPATHMSD 112× LAMBDA bug) + archive_sigma_stuck_2026-04-15/ (Job 42679152 SIGMA too narrow).

4_skeptic.verdict: FP-024 diagnosed 2026-04-15 (SIGMA collapse under ADAPTIVE=GEOM). Probe Job 43813633 (10 ns) reached max s=1.393 with escape signature (s↔z Pearson +0.49 last 2 ns). Now checkpoint-extended as Job 44008381 (10→50 ns), currently at 25.56 ns, max s=2.794 (2026-04-17 12:33). Stage 4 gate waits for 50 ns result or max s≥5 trigger.
4_skeptic.blocking_issue: Job 44008381 running on hov. Live @ 2026-04-17 15:32: 27.68 ns, max s=3.494 — first crossing of s=3 threshold (1.41% frames s>3). Monotone climb across 6×5ns windows (1.18→1.39→1.46→1.81→2.79→3.49). Now in 3≤s<5 observation band — let 50 ns finish. Phase 2 probability rising.
4_skeptic.fix_status: plumed.dat (PATHMSD, LAMBDA=379.77, SIGMA=0.1, SIGMA_MIN=0.3/0.005, SIGMA_MAX=1.0/0.05) deployed to Longleaf 2026-04-15 (md5 aca3f0c4..., two-way identical). Checkpoint restart protocol FP-026 verified: HILLS append-only, no bck.*.HILLS. Job 44008381 RUNNING (25.56/50 ns, ETA ~2026-04-19).
